title: 2026 Oscars Best Actress Predictions
text: Variety's Awards Circuit predictions show Jessie Buckley has decisively secured the lead in the Best Actress race for the 98th Academy Awards. Her performance in Chloé Zhao's film Hamnet has dominated the awards season. Buckley's role in the Shakespearean grief drama has swept the major precursors and dominated the awards conversation. Other contenders include Rose Byrne in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You, who delivers a ferocious performance of a character experiencing deterioration. Kate Hudson makes her return to Oscar consideration 24 years after Almost Famous. Renate Reinsve anchors Joachim Trier's Norwegian drama Sentimental Value with restrained strength. Emma Stone, the two-time Oscar winner, embraces bold absurdity in Yorgos Lanthimos's Bugonia.
